channel.title: config on fatwaer
channel.description: Recent content in config on fatwaer

item.title: Hugo is comming !
item.description: Markdown 图床最开始用微博+chrome插件， 后来微博开启了防盗链， 转移到了七牛+picGo。 https://www.cnblogs.com/Dozeer/p/10965508.html hugo markdown格式修正 末尾两个空格换行 加载错误，CORS policy跨域访问禁止 Mixed Content: The page at 'https://fatwaer.me/posts/%E5%88%86%E5%B8%83%E5%BC%8F%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F/6-824-notes/' was loaded over HTTPS, but requested an insecure script 'http://fatwaer.me/js/back2top.js'. This request has been blocked; the content must be served over HTTPS. 在原来的主题上面加一个回到顶部的按钮 6 organization content 7 front matter 8 archetypes 9 shortcodes 10 taxonomies 11 template basic 12 list template 13 single template 14 homepage template 15 section template 16 base template https://discourse.

item.title: hexo 配置
item.description:
注： 博客已经从hexo迁移到了hugo，部分格式已经不能渲染出来。

categories和tags

themes文件夹下面的_config.yml有一个memu选项，hiker是默认有归档选项的。但是分类和标签是空页面，本地访问会提示 GET ERROR 的404错误。在md文件有表示的情况下，像如下配置即可。

type: "categories"
layout: "categories"
comments: false

type: "tags"
layout: "tags"
comments: false
